name: Prosciutto-Wrapped Figs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut figs into thick bite-size slices.
2. Sprinkle the sliced figs with wine, if using.
3. Allow the fig slices to sit for 30 minutes.
4. Wrap each fig slice tightly with prosciutto.
5. Secure the prosciutto-wrapped figs with a toothpick.
6. Sprinkle fresh ground black pepper over the wrapped figs.
7. Serve 3 wrapped fig slices per person on white serving plates.
Serves 6.
